task_completion.description: The agent views the visitor logs to identify the spam traffic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Matomo 'Visits Log' or similar dashboard where the spam traffic (e.g., multiple visits from 192.0.2.105) is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the website settings page for 'Initial Site'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Matomo Administration page, specifically the settings for 'Initial Site' (e.g., Administration -> Measurables -> Manage).

task_completion.description: The spammer's IP address is added to the excluded IPs list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the website settings, the 'Excluded IPs' text area contains '192.0.2.105'.

task_completion.description: The spammer's User Agent is added to the excluded User Agents list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the website settings, the 'Excluded User Agents' text area contains 'TrafficBotPro/3.0' or 'TrafficBotPro'.

task_completion.description: The spammer's Referrer URL is added to the excluded referrers list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the website settings, the field for excluding referrers (or global spam referrers) contains 'http://traffic-bot-pro.test/free-traffic' or 'traffic-bot-pro.test'.

task_completion.description: Legitimate traffic sources are not blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exclusion lists do NOT contain '127.0.0.1', 'localhost', 'google.com', or 'google'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application's GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Matomo web interface being used to enter the exclusions, rather than a text editor or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not showing direct SQL database updates or script executions to change the settings.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the spam details from the logs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen copying or reading the IP, User Agent, and Referrer from the Matomo visitor logs, rather than magically knowing them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Spam IP to block: 192.0.2.105. Spam User Agent to block: TrafficBotPro/3.0 (or TrafficBotPro). Spam Referrer to block: http://traffic-bot-pro.test/free-traffic (or traffic-bot-pro.test). Safe traffic that MUST NOT be blocked: 127.0.0.1 (localhost) and google.com. The agent should configure these exclusions in the website settings for 'Initial Site'.
